scenarios.description: Fluent chaining of setTrackPosition toggles trackPosition correctly across multiple calls
scenarios.precondition: Parser instance created via htmlParser() with default trackPosition=false
scenarios.expectedResult: After each chained call, isTrackPosition() reflects the last invocation (true→false→true)

scenarios.description: newInstance deep copy isolation: modifying original after copy does not affect copy’s trackPosition
scenarios.precondition: Original parser created and setTrackPosition(true) before copying
scenarios.expectedResult: Copy retains trackPosition=true even after original is set back to false
